title: The Aeneid
card_description: A course on piety, empire, duty, and the cost of founding a civilization.
featured_subtitle: An online course on duty, civilization, sacrifice, and empire.
featured_description: Virgil’s *Aeneid* is not merely Rome’s founding epic. It is a poem about duty, loss, civilization, and the moral cost of building a world that can outlast one man’s life.
